languages.text: "Истребляй причину, а не симптоматику, как гласит древняя мудрость Магос Биологис". {n}Манипулус задумчиво касается подбородка одним из мехадендритов.{/n} "Нунциус, много ли ты знаешь мирян, способных целенаправленно истязать духа машины?" {n}Выслушав безмолвный ответ сервочерепа, он кивает.{/n} "Солидарен, коллега. Мы явно имеем дело с попыткой саботажа".

"Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."
languages.original_text: "Истребляй причину, а не симптоматику, как гласит древняя мудрость Магос Биологис". {n}Манипулус задумчиво касается подбородка одним из мехадендритов.{/n} "Нунциус, много ли ты знаешь мирян, способных целенаправленно истязать духа машины?" {n}Выслушав безмолвный ответ сервочерепа, он кивает.{/n} "Солидарен, коллега. Мы явно имеем дело с попыткой саботажа".

We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."

"Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."

"Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."

languages.text: «Como dicta la sabiduría del Magos Biologis, hay que eliminar la causa, no el síntoma». {n}El manipulus se frota el mentón con una mecadendrita.{/n} «Nuncius, ¿conoce a muchos laicos capaz de torturar intencionadamente a un espíritu máquina?». {n}Tras escuchar la silenciosa respuesta del servocráneo, asiente.{/n} «Estoy de acuerdo, estimado colega. Nos encontramos ante un intento de sabotaje».
languages.original_text: "Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."

traits.locale_text: «Como dicta la sabiduría del Magos Biologis, hay que eliminar la causa, no el síntoma». {n}El manipulus se frota el mentón con una mecadendrita.{/n} «Nuncius, ¿conoce a muchos laicos capaz de torturar intencionadamente a un espíritu máquina?». {n}Tras escuchar la silenciosa respuesta del servocráneo, asiente.{/n} «Estoy de acuerdo, estimado colega. Nos encontramos ante un intento de sabotaje».

languages.text: “正如生物贤者的古老箴言所说，消除病因，而非症状。”{n}操纵者用一根机械触须若有所思地摩挲着下巴。{/n}“努恩修斯，你见过多少教外人士有能力蓄意折磨机魂？”{n}听完伺服头骨无声的回应后，他点了点头。{/n}“我赞同，最亲爱的同僚。这明显是一起蓄意破坏行为。”
languages.original_text: "Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."

traits.locale_text: “正如生物贤者的古老箴言所说，消除病因，而非症状。”{n}操纵者用一根机械触须若有所思地摩挲着下巴。{/n}“努恩修斯，你见过多少教外人士有能力蓄意折磨机魂？”{n}听完伺服头骨无声的回应后，他点了点头。{/n}“我赞同，最亲爱的同僚。这明显是一起蓄意破坏行为。”

languages.text: « Il faut éliminer la cause et non le symptôme, comme le veut la sagesse ancienne des Magos Biologis. » {n}Le manipulus caresse son menton avec une mécadendrite, pensif.{/n} « Nuncius, connais-tu beaucoup de profanes capables de torturer délibérément un esprit de la machine ? {n}Il écoute la réponse silencieuse du servocrâne et hoche la tête.{/n} Je suis du même avis, cher collègue. Nous avons clairement affaire à une tentative de sabotage. »
languages.original_text: "Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."

traits.locale_text: « Il faut éliminer la cause et non le symptôme, comme le veut la sagesse ancienne des Magos Biologis. » {n}Le manipulus caresse son menton avec une mécadendrite, pensif.{/n} « Nuncius, connais-tu beaucoup de profanes capables de torturer délibérément un esprit de la machine ? {n}Il écoute la réponse silencieuse du servocrâne et hoche la tête.{/n} Je suis du même avis, cher collègue. Nous avons clairement affaire à une tentative de sabotage. »

languages.text: "Magos Biyologis'in kadim bilgeliğinin de belirttiği üzere belirtiyi değil, nedeni ortadan kaldırmalı." {n}Manipülus, mekadentritlerinden biriyle düşünceli bir şekilde çenesini okşuyor.{/n} "Nuncius, bir makine ruhuna kasıtlı olarak işkence edebilecek kaç tane avam tanıyorsun?" {n}Hizmeletin suskun cevabını dinledikten sonra başını sallıyor.{/n} "Aynı fikirdeyim pek değerli meslektaşım. Belli ki bir sabotaj girişimiyle karşı karşıyayız."
languages.original_text: "Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."

traits.locale_text: "Magos Biyologis'in kadim bilgeliğinin de belirttiği üzere belirtiyi değil, nedeni ortadan kaldırmalı." {n}Manipülus, mekadentritlerinden biriyle düşünceli bir şekilde çenesini okşuyor.{/n} "Nuncius, bir makine ruhuna kasıtlı olarak işkence edebilecek kaç tane avam tanıyorsun?" {n}Hizmeletin suskun cevabını dinledikten sonra başını sallıyor.{/n} "Aynı fikirdeyim pek değerli meslektaşım. Belli ki bir sabotaj girişimiyle karşı karşıyayız."

languages.text: 「症状ではなく原因を取り除け――マゴス・ビオロギスの古き叡智が説く通りです」{n}マニピュルスは機械触手の一本で、考え込むように顎をなでた。{/n}「ヌンキウス、機械精霊を意図的に苦しめることのできる世俗の者を、君は数多く知っていますか？」{n}サーヴォスカルの無言の返答に耳を傾けた後、彼はうなずいた。{/n}「同感です、親愛なる同僚。我々は明らかに、妨害工作の試みに対処しているのです」
languages.original_text: "Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."

traits.locale_text: 「症状ではなく原因を取り除け――マゴス・ビオロギスの古き叡智が説く通りです」{n}マニピュルスは機械触手の一本で、考え込むように顎をなでた。{/n}「ヌンキウス、機械精霊を意図的に苦しめることのできる世俗の者を、君は数多く知っていますか？」{n}サーヴォスカルの無言の返答に耳を傾けた後、彼はうなずいた。{/n}「同感です、親愛なる同僚。我々は明らかに、妨害工作の試みに対処しているのです」

languages.text: "Bekämpft die Ursache, nicht das Symptom, wie es die alte Weisheit der Magos Biologis besagt." {n}Der Manipulus kratzt sich mit einem seiner Mechadendriten nachdenklich am Kinn.{/n} "Nuncius, wisst Ihr, wie viele Laien in der Lage sind, einen Maschinengeist wissentlich zu quälen?" {n}Nach der lautlosen Antwort des Servoschädels nickt er.{/n} "Das sehe ich ähnlich, geschätzter Kollege. Wir haben es hier eindeutig mit einem Sabotageversuch zu tun."
languages.original_text: "Eliminate the cause, not the symptom, as the ancient wisdom of the Magos Biologis states." {n}The Manipulus strokes his chin pensively with one of his mechadendrites.{/n} "Nuncius, do you know of many laypersons capable of deliberately torturing a machine spirit?" {n}After listening to the servo-skull's silent reply, he nods.{/n} "I concur, dearest colleague. We are clearly dealing with attempted sabotage."

Wir haben es hier eindeutig mit einem Sabotageversuch zu tun."
